meta.title: FAQ | Prayaan Capital
meta.description: Frequently asked questions about Prayaan Capital loans, eligibility, documentation, and repayment.

sections.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.subheadline: Everything you need to know before you apply.

faqs.question: What is Prayaan Capital?
faqs.answer: Prayaan Capital is an RBI-registered NBFC that provides secured business loans and LAP-style financing to MSMEs in Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, and Telangana.

faqs.question: Is Prayaan Capital regulated by RBI?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our RBI registration certificate is available on the RBI Disclosures page.

faqs.question: What types of businesses can apply?
faqs.answer: MSMEs in manufacturing, trading, and services operating in TN, AP, or Telangana. Both men and women business owners are eligible.

faqs.question: What is the minimum and maximum loan amount?
faqs.answer: Secured Business Loans: ₹5 Lakhs to ₹50 Lakhs. LAP-Style Financing: ₹25 Lakhs to ₹2 Crore.

faqs.question: What interest rates do you charge?
faqs.answer: Secured Business Loans: 16%–24% p.a. LAP-Style Financing: 14%–20% p.a. on a reducing balance basis.

faqs.question: How long does approval take?
faqs.answer: Credit decisions are typically provided within 48 hours of receiving complete documentation.

faqs.question: How do I apply?
faqs.answer: Apply online via our Apply Now page, visit any branch, or contact a relationship manager. The initial application takes about 10 minutes.

faqs.question: What documents do I need?
faqs.answer: KYC documents (Aadhaar, PAN), 12 months bank statements, business proof (GST/Udyam), ITR, and property documents if applicable.

faqs.question: Is there a processing fee?
faqs.answer: Yes. Processing fee is 1%–2% for Secured Business Loans and 1%–1.5% for LAP Financing, deducted from the disbursed amount.

faqs.question: How do I pay my EMI?
faqs.answer: EMIs are collected via NACH auto-debit. You can also pay via UPI or NEFT. See the Customer Payments section for details.

faqs.question: Can I prepay my loan?
faqs.answer: Yes. Secured Business Loans: nil after 12 months. LAP: 2% charge within 24 months, nil thereafter.

faqs.question: What happens if I miss an EMI?
faqs.answer: Penal interest of 2% per month is charged on overdue amounts. Contact your relationship manager immediately if you anticipate difficulty.
